Part 1: We are under attack!: Part 1

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission Fulzar Inv1

Defeat 100 Nexar Commander lvl 110, Nexar Skirmisher lvl 85, Nexar Vanguard lvl 84, Nexar Stealth Bomber lvl 80

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Start at AF Security Gate in Fulzar.
  2. Defeat 100 Nexar Commander lvl 110, Nexar Skirmisher lvl 85, Nexar Vanguard lvl 84, Nexar Stealth Bomber lvl 80.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock We are under attack!: Part 2.

Description

Operative Smith: We are under attack! Last week ships from an unidentified race appeared just outside of here. At first they didn’t attack us. But unfortunately some overeager adventures attacked them… Now they are back… and in force this time… it seems like this new species have declared war on us. They have somehow opened up a black hole right next to our base and enemies are streaming into the system. Please help defend New Erath from the coming onslaught! Countless lives depend upon you!

Completion

Operative Smith: Excellent work there! You’re getting quite proficient at this killing business... However, it doesn't seem to be enough to stop them. Their ranks are refilling too quickly. We have identified an enemy commander, whom we believe is in charge of the invading force. Take him out and maybe they will pull back...

Part 2: We are under attack!: Part 2

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission Fulzar Inv2

Defeat 1 Nexar Commander lvl 110

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 1 Nexar Commander lvl 110.

Description

Operative Smith: We have identified an enemy commander, whom we believe is in charge of the invading force. Take him out and maybe they will retreat back...

Completion

Operative Smith: Seems like their ranks are disoriented for now. But there is still no sign of a withdrawal... We have to think of something else.

Want to improve this wiki? Contributions are welcome on github.com/guedesite/astroflux-wiki.
